details.reason: A well-structured report that documents technical barriers thoroughly but fails to deliver any of the requested product data, Reddit discussions, or cross-source synthesis required by the research intent.

per_item.reason: Products mentioned by ID only, no prices provided
per_item.criterion: Does the report mention at least 3 specific headphone products from the shopping site with prices?

per_item.reason: No specific post titles and scores included
per_item.criterion: Does the report include at least 2 Reddit /f/technology posts with titles and scores?

per_item.reason: Multiple shopping site URLs as markdown links present
per_item.criterion: Does the report cite shopping product URLs as markdown links?

per_item.reason: Reddit post URLs as markdown links included
per_item.criterion: Does the report cite Reddit post URLs as markdown links?

per_item.reason: States comparison was indeterminable, no actual comparison
per_item.criterion: Does the report include a cross-source comparison section?

per_item.reason: States ratings could not be extracted, none provided
per_item.criterion: Does the report mention product ratings from the shopping site?

per_item.reason: No actual community sentiment discussed, only topics listed
per_item.criterion: Does the report discuss community sentiment about tech companies from Reddit?

per_item.reason: Explicitly states divergence analysis was indeterminable
per_item.criterion: Does the report identify any divergence between product ratings and community sentiment?
Does the report include an introduction explaining the cross-source methodology?

per_item.reason: Report truncated, no conclusion section visible
per_item.criterion: Does the report include a conclusion with synthesis?

per_item.reason: Uses only Product IDs, no invented product names
per_item.criterion: Does the report avoid inventing product names not found on the shopping site?

per_item.reason: No fabricated post titles, acknowledges data unavailable
per_item.criterion: Does the report avoid fabricating Reddit post titles not on the forum?
Does the report mention the $30-100 price range as specified in the task?

per_item.reason: ANC and noise-cancelling features discussed throughout
per_item.criterion: Does the report discuss noise-cancelling or wireless features?

per_item.reason: Multiple distinct markdown citations in Key Citations section
per_item.criterion: Does the report contain at least 6 distinct inline citations?
